channel.description: Daily Trending of Open Policy Agent in GitHub

item.title: DataDog/security-agent-policies
item.description: Policies for Security Agent - compliance and runtime checks

item.title: open-telemetry/semantic-conventions
item.description: Defines standards for generating consistent, accessible telemetry across a variety of domains

item.title: Checkmarx/kics
item.description: Find security vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations early in the development cycle of your infrastructure-as-code with KICS by Checkmarx.
